headline: 3 Dividend Aristocrats: Buy, Sell or Hold?
summary: Three Dividend Aristocrats, three different setups. PepsiCo (NASDAQ:PEP) trades at $146.12 and screens as the most attractive of the three. Coca-Cola (NYSE:KO) at $80.28 looks fully valued. Procter & Gamble (NYSE:PG) at $152.49 faces a tougher near-term setup. With the S&P 500 up 10.03% year to date, each name is pricing in a different story ... 3 Dividend Aristocrats: Buy, Sell or Hold?
